mapper.sql: id, conference_id, name, description, color, icon, type, sort, create_time, update_time, creator_id, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM registration_group WHERE conference_id = #{conferenceId} AND deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM registration_group WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE registration_group SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, color = #{color}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE registration_group SET deleted = TRUE, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration_group WHERE conference_id = #{conferenceId} AND deleted = FALSE
